key_theorem: RMT-EML Theorem (S320): GUE = EML-3 (unitary matrices = exp(iθ) = complex oscillatory). Zeta zeros = EML-3 (exp(i·t·log p) = complex). GUE⊗Zeros = 3⊗3=3: same-type, compatible. NEW: Shadow Depth Theorem FORCES GUE ↔ zeros correspondence. Both have shadow=3; Shadow Depth Theorem predicts they must be in same EML stratum. Montgomery conjecture (GUE statistics for zeros) is REQUIRED by the depth structure. Katz-Sarnak: all symmetry families are EML-3; 3⊗3=3 for all pairs.
rabbit_hole_log: NEW: Shadow Depth Theorem forces GUE-zeros correspondence (both shadow=3)
Montgomery conjecture = REQUIRED by depth structure (not just empirical!)
